pricing.title: Turn on all features. Clean your Gmail without limits.
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans. Cancel anytime.

trust.cancel: Cancel or change plans at anytime.
trust.share: Buy 5 accounts and share them with friends and family.

hero.title: Take back control of your
hero.subtitle: Clean your mailbox in a few clicks. Group your emails by sender, unsubscribe easily and delete in bulk.
hero.secure: 🔒 Secure and confidential - No data stored

mockup.title: Senders
mockup.preview: ⬆️ Preview of the real interface - Your senders will appear after login
mockup.loading: The refresh icon spins continuously while analyzing your emails
mockup.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or domain...

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Authenticate securely with your Google account

step2.title: Analyze your emails
step2.description: CleanMail scans your Gmail inbox and counts the number of emails received per sender automatically

step3.title: Clean in 1 click
step3.description: Unsubscribe or bulk delete unwanted emails

grouping.title: Smart grouping
grouping.description: View all your senders grouped with the exact number of emails received. Quickly identify who's cluttering your inbox.

search.title: Instant search
search.description: Quickly find a specific sender by searching by name, email or domain. Real-time filtering.

unsubscribe.title: Automatic unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Automatically detect unsubscribe links in email headers and unsubscribe with one click.

massDelete.title: Bulk delete
massDelete.description: Trash all emails from a sender with one click. Up to 500 emails processed simultaneously.

security.title: Maximum security
security.description: Your tokens are encrypted with iron-session. No data is stored. Everything happens server-side securely.

cta.title: Ready to clean your Gmail inbox?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have already taken back control

footer.tagline: A simple tool to manage your Gmail emails.
footer.secure: 🔒 Your data is secure and never stored
